sentence: 新上任的总编辑决定改版报纸。
pinyin: Xīn shàngrèn de zǒng biānjí juédìng gǎibǎn bàozhǐ.
english: The newly appointed chief editor decided to redesign the newspaper.

meaning: 1. to release on bail; 2. to bail
sentence: 他交了保证金后获得保释。
pinyin: Tā jiāo le bǎozhèngjīn hòu huòdé bǎoshì.
english: He was released on bail after paying the deposit.

sentence: 他们两个异地恋已经坚持三年了。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè yìdì liàn yǐjīng jiānchí sān nián le.
english: The two of them have maintained a long-distance relationship for three years.

sentence: 在某些国家，持枪需要申请专门的许可证。
pinyin: Zài mǒuxiē guójiā, chíqiāng xūyào shēnqǐng zhuānmén de xǔkězhèng.
english: In some countries, carrying a gun requires applying for a special license.

sentence: 金属传热快，所以锅把容易变烫。
pinyin: Jīnshǔ chuánrè kuài, suǒyǐ guō bǎ róngyì biàn tàng.
english: Metal conducts heat quickly, which is why pot handles get hot easily.
